data.raceName: COPRICE WORKING DOG CHICKEN SPRINT PBD
data.raceComments: {"comment":"5. SUNRISE MICHELLE was a strong winner (18.86) from box 6 last time, scoring by 7 lengths at Manukau. Will need some luck early after drawing a tricky box here. Has hit winning form and can measure up again. 8. WEETBIX AND MILO returned a better run last time, finishing in the money (21.67) at this track behind Altruism in a Class 1. Has the early speed to land on the pace and can stick on. Expecting another good run. 7. ORDER FOR BRAX turned in a moderate performance last time when fifth at this track over 375m behind Scout Jack (22.11) in a Class 1. Was in the money prior to that. One of the main contenders. 6. OPAWA KELSEY can play a role in the finish without surprising. Should be finishing on strongly over the sprint trip.","runners":[5,8,7,6],"exclusive":false}
